# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a formal conference paper with a concrete benchmark and reported model performance results.

## Why

The excerpt presents SWE-bench as a structured evaluation framework built from 2,294 real software engineering tasks, explains benchmark construction, and reports explicit experimental outcomes such as Claude 2 resolving 1.96% of issues. That is clear empirical substance and fits institute-worthy admission.

## Limits
